news.Title: [AI Summary] 精材營收報喜股價飆漲 董事會通過資本預算與股利分派
news.Content: • 精材本週股價上漲 7.65%，主要受惠於 2026 年 1 月合併營收年增 45.8% [1]。, • 公司董事會通過 114 年度財務報告、股利分派案，並規劃斥資 14.08 億元擴充新廠無塵室及裝機工程 [2] [3] [4]。 【綜合分析】 參考來源：Yahoo奇摩股市: 7則 | 資料期間：2026-01-28 至 2026-02-10 | 新聞數量：7 則 半導體封測廠精材（3374.TWO）近期股價表現強勁，週漲幅達 6.34%，尤其在 2026 年 2 月 11 日單日更飆漲 7.65%，收盤價來到 176.00 元。此波股價上漲主要受惠於公司公布的亮眼營收數據。精材於 2 月 10 日公告，2026 年 1 月合併營收達 6.51 億元，較去年同期大幅成長 45.8% [1]。 除了營收成長動能，精材的資本支出計畫與股利政策也獲得市場關注。公司於 2 月 5 日召開董事會，不僅通過了 2025 年度財務報告 [3]，更決議通過一項金額高達 14.08 億元的新廠擴充資本預算案，計畫用於新廠擴充無塵室、裝機工程及廠務設施，以因應業務發展需求 [2]。同時，董事會也決議 2025 年度將配發現金股利每股 2.5 元，總金額達 6.78 億元，展現回饋股東的誠意 [4]。此外，公司亦於 2 月 6 日公告一筆總金額約 9.87 億元的廠務工程訂單 [5]。精材並將於 2 月 10 日參加凱基證券舉辦的線上法說會，屆時將進一步說明經營成果及營運展望 [6]。

news.Title: [AI Summary] Xintec Posts Strong Revenue Growth, Stock Surges on Capital Budget and Dividend Approval
news.Content: • Xintec stock rose 7.65% this week, primarily driven by a 45.8% year-on-year increase in January 2026 consolidated revenue [1]., • The company's board of directors approved the 2025 annual financial report and dividend distribution, and plans to invest NT$1.408 billion for new cleanroom and installation projects [2] [3] [4]. [Analysis] Sources: Yahoo Finance Taiwan: 7 articles | Period: 2026-01-28 to 2026-02-10 | Number of articles: 7 Xintec (3374.TWO), a semiconductor packaging and testing company, has seen strong stock performance recently, with a weekly gain of 6.34%. Notably, on February 11, 2026, the stock surged by 7.65% to close at NT$176.00. This upward movement is largely attributed to the company's impressive revenue figures. On February 10, Xintec announced that its consolidated revenue for January 2026 reached NT$651 million, a significant 45.8% increase compared to the same period last year [1]. In addition to revenue growth, Xintec's capital expenditure plans and dividend policy have garnered market attention. The company's board of directors convened on February 5, not only approving the 2025 annual financial report [3] but also greenlighting a capital expenditure budget of NT$1.408 billion for new factory expansion. This investment will be allocated to cleanroom construction, equipment installation, and plant facilities to support business development [2]. Concurrently, the board resolved to distribute a cash dividend of NT$2.5 per share for the year 2025, totaling NT$678.41 million, demonstrating a commitment to shareholder returns [4]. Furthermore, the company announced on February 6 an order for plant engineering services valued at approximately NT$986.7 million [5]. Xintec is also scheduled to participate in an online investor conference hosted by KGI Securities on February 10, where it will provide further details on its operational results and future outlook [6].
